# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    protocol: http
    host: users-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths:
          - /users
          - /users/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426

  - name: orders-service
    protocol: http
    host: orders-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths:
          - /orders
          - /orders/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426

  - name: payments-service
    protocol: http
    host: payments-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000
    routes:
      - name: payments-route
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths:
          - /payments
          - /payments/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    hash_on_cookie_path: /
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        https_verify_certificate: false
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: users-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    hash_on_cookie_path: /
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        https_verify_certificate: false
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: orders-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: orders-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: payments-upstream
    algorithm: least-connections
    slots: 10000
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    hash_on_cookie_path: /
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        https_verify_certificate: false
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: payments-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: payments-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100
